rationale: The cited paper appears once in the background section as a benchmark finding that about one-third of a promotion bump is due to brand switching in CPG settings. In the citing paper, this serves as general prior-context evidence about substitution patterns, not as a framework, method, or decomposition that is reused in the analyses. The core design (field experiments on an e-book platform, search mechanism tests, and machine-learning targeting) is developed independently of that citation.
